calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-17-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lon Lazar for and with (executor) Jo Galatoire.

The Court stated that there is no appearance by Mr. Murphy and asked counsel if he had anything further to report. Mr. Lazar stated that if the Court is denying Mr. Murphy's petition they have nothing to say. Ms. Galatoire read a statement to the Court. The Court stated that it has nothing to do with this case, that it has to do with her mother's case. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
